TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_‘Etolan, title = ‘Etolan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/‘Etolan} }

S.FORM: alang 'Etolan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,032 buwan, 2,486 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 1,178 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 1,308 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 44%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%.

alang 'Etolan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,032 buwan, 2,486 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 47% kyan ku 1,178 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 53% kyan ku 1,308 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 44%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%.
S.PHON: alaŋ ʔetolan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%.
